Class PublicationsDelegate.PublicationGroupDelegate

  • Method Details

    • publication

      public org.savantbuild.dep.domain.Publication publication(Map<String,Object> attributes)
      Defines a publication. This takes a Map of attributes but only the name, type, file and source attributes are required.
      Parameters:
      attributes - The attributes.
      Returns:
      The Publication object.
